profile_atoms.claim: User self-report suggests relatively high extraversion on this instrument. Treat as provisional self-report evidence, not a fixed identity claim.
profile_atoms.label: Surgency Or Extraversion self-report tendency

profile_atoms.claim: User self-report suggests relatively high agreeableness on this instrument. Treat as provisional self-report evidence, not a fixed identity claim.
profile_atoms.label: Agreeableness self-report tendency

profile_atoms.claim: User self-report suggests moderately elevated conscientiousness on this instrument. Treat as provisional self-report evidence, not a fixed identity claim.
profile_atoms.label: Conscientiousness self-report tendency

profile_atoms.claim: User self-report suggests moderately low neuroticism or emotional reactivity on this instrument. Treat as provisional self-report evidence, not a diagnostic conclusion.
profile_atoms.label: Neuroticism B self-report tendency

profile_atoms.claim: User self-report suggests relatively high openness on this instrument. Treat as provisional self-report evidence, not a fixed identity claim.
profile_atoms.label: Intellect Or Imagination self-report tendency
